full_text:
Liu Cheng 劉承
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Cheng (劉承)was born in Zhuo county, Zhuo commandery. Died young and was lamented by Liu Shan. Liu Cheng was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Liu Cheng lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
